text:
Montana Third-Party 
Administrator (TPA) (retired 
after 2019 data year) 
97: Pennsylvania CHIP 

COMMENT: Codes represent FIPS state codes or outlying areas under U.S. sovereignty (e.g., Puerto Rico, US Virgin 
Islands, Guam), except for ’93,’ ’94,’ and ’97,’ which represent non-Medicaid entities from states that 
submit CHIP or TPA separately from Medicaid. 

For those states with multiple reporting entities, all values of SUBMTG_STATE_CD should be used (‘56’ 
and ‘93’ for Wyoming; ‘30’ and
